features.name: Prism File Import
features.description: Registers a file handler for .prism (GraphPad Prism) files, allowing users to open and import them directly into the Datagrok platform.
features.evidence_summary: importPrism carries role=fileHandler and ext=prism, directly implementing .prism file opening; the readme documents overall package usage.

features.name: Prism File Preview
features.description: Provides an in-place file viewer for .prism files, rendering a preview view when browsing or selecting Prism files without a full import.
features.evidence_summary: previewPrism carries role=fileViewer and fileViewer=prism, purpose distinct from the importer — it surfaces a view for in-browser file inspection.
